title: Create view only users from item
excerpt: I would like to create view only users from items-- based on a status of the item the item name is the person/user name and we have their email in a column. Basically want to use it as a sign up to get user access. We ac…

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to create view only users from items-- based on a status of the item the item name is the person/user name and we have their email in a column. Basically want to use it as a sign up to get user access. We actually do NOT want those people to actually be real users/people who log in we use it to track things we assign them to but they do not track on it.

posts.author: themondaymaster (The Monday Master)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @jpelrman87, have you considered using the team function to act as a ghost user? You can name a team, the name of a person on your team, they don’t have access to the platform in any capacity, but you’re able to still assign them in a person column. Information on the team function is HERE

posts.author: themondaymaster (The Monday Master)
posts.cookedHtml: @jpelrman87 of the teams? Natively no. Then it becomes a question of how often your creating teams vs the cost of building a custom one.
